_comment: Curated MITRE ATT&CK technique names + primary tactic for every technique referenced by rustinel-rules. Consumed by tools/build_catalog.py to produce human-readable, SEO-friendly technique pages. Add an entry whenever a rule introduces a new technique id; build_catalog.py warns on any unknown technique.

T1003.002.name: OS Credential Dumping: Security Account Manager

T1059.004.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell

T1070.001.name: Indicator Removal: Clear Windows Event Logs

T1543.001.name: Create or Modify System Process: Launch Agent

T1543.002.name: Create or Modify System Process: Systemd Service

T1543.003.name: Create or Modify System Process: Windows Service

T1543.004.name: Create or Modify System Process: Launch Daemon

T1546.004.name: Event Triggered Execution: Unix Shell Configuration Modification

T1547.001.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder

T1548.002.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Bypass User Account Control

T1548.003.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Sudo and Sudo Caching

T1562.001.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

T1574.006.name: Hijack Execution Flow: Dynamic Linker Hijacking
